subcodes.title: Answer to questions, Dublin, 1912-08-10
subcodes.first_line: The basic principles of all religions are the same and the Sun of Truth is one, yet every day it appears from a different dawning point.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی اصول ادیان یکی است و شمس حقیقت واحد ولکن در هر یومی از مطلعی نمودار پس بهآئیان معتقد باصول ادیان و متوجه شمس حقیقتند
subcodes.subjects: @literal interpretation, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @oneness; unity of religion, @Manifestation of God as sun, @suffering; rejection of Christ
